Modern Rock.description: Aggressive and loud; Intelligent clipping for punchy drums and glued center.

Alt Metal / Emo.description: Balanced energy with vocal shimmer; ideal for your current style.

Acoustic / Introspective.description: Transparent and dynamic; preserves the 'human' feel with subtle tape warmth.

Streaming Standard.description: Safe, versatile setting for YouTube and Spotify; balanced glue.

Heavy Metal / Djent.description: Maximum density; aggressive Intelligent clipping for wall-of-sound mixes.

Pop / Radio.description: Bright 'Air' and tight low-end; polished radio-ready compression.

Hip-Hop / Trap.description: Sub-bass focus; Intelligent clipping keeps kicks hard while gluing the mix.

Lo-Fi / Chill.description: Warm saturation with rolled-off highs; nostalgic vibe with heavy glue.

EDM / Club.description: Highest energy; optimized for club sound systems with aggressive width.

Jazz / Fusion.description: High dynamic range; preserves instrumental nuances with light glue.

Classical / Orchestral.description: Ultra-transparent; zero saturation to maintain natural timbre.

Country / Americana.description: Warm mids and clear vocals; analog tape feel.

Blues / Soul.description: Rich harmonic saturation to mimic vintage analog tape glue.

Podcast / Spoken Word.description: Vocal clarity; consistent levels via tighter center-channel glue.

Synthwave / 80s.description: Extreme 'Air' boost and retro-style Intelligent clipping.

Punk / Grunge.description: Raw, unpolished energy with aggressive Intelligent clipping.

Cinematic / Trailer.description: Huge dynamic shifts with impactful Intelligent saturation.

Reggae / Dub.description: Heavy low-end warmth with smooth, dark tape saturation.

Indie / Dream Pop.description: Lush textures and airy vocals; moderate glue.

Extreme Loudness.description: Maximum competitive loudness via Intelligent clipping and heavy glue.
